name: the universal rules are registered in the catalog and cite their source authority
command: grep -q 'id: g-universal-no-hardcoded-secrets' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/_universal/universal-standards.yaml" && grep -q 'source: owasp-asvs' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/_universal/universal-standards.yaml" && echo universal-rules-grounded 1>&2
